title: helichrysum arenarium subsp. aucheri
intro: Helichrysum arenarium subsp. aucheri, also known as Aucher's helichrysum or Rock Helichrysum, is a perennial herb of the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Helichrysum arenarium subsp. aucheri is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
